basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has officially announced the Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been released on the official website of ICAR IARI. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 35 years and hold a Master’s degree (M.Tech/M.Sc.) in Soil & Water Conservation Engineering, Water Science & Technology, Agronomy, Soil Science, Agricultural Physics, or Agro-meteorology can now submit their applications via email up to 17-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Women, 3 years for OBC

qualification.details: Master's degree (M.Tech/M.Sc.) in Soil & Water conservation Engineering or Water Science & Technology or Agronomy or Soil Science or Agricultural Physics or Agro-meteorology

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA - Rs. 42,000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA - Rs. 42,000/- + HRA Per Month

selection_process: Screening of applications Shortlisting Walk-in Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow position is 17th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree (M.Tech/M.Sc.) in specific fields like Soil & Water conservation Engineering, Water Science & Technology, Agronomy, Soil Science, Agricultural Physics, or Agro-meteorology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Senior Research Fellow post is between 18 to 35 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening of applications, shortlisting of eligible candidates, and a final walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000/- + HRA to Rs. 42,000/- + HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Senior Research Fellow at ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is to be done via Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q9. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Research Fellow position will be conducted on 22nd May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute located?
faq.answer: ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012.
